creator: sten@blinkenlights.nl
text:
On Wed, 19 Sep 2007, FreeBSD-gnats-submit@FreeBSD.org wrote:

> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=116456
>
>> Category:       ports
>> Responsible:    freebsd-ports-bugs
>> Synopsis:       New port: irc/py-gozerbot gozerbot is a Python IRC and Jabber bot
>> Arrival-Date:   Wed Sep 19 07:30:01 GMT 2007

The port doesn't supply egg-info files, which python-2.5 looks for,
I've disabled support for these.

Here 's a new shar with the following changes:
(tested on python 2.4 and python 2.5)

- updated to 0.7.1.1
- added manpage
- fix for egg-info
- added gozerbot/contrib to plist

# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	irc/py-gozerbot
#	irc/py-gozerbot/Makefile
#	irc/py-gozerbot/distinfo
#	irc/py-gozerbot/pkg-descr
#	irc/py-gozerbot/pkg-message
#	irc/py-gozerbot/pkg-plist
#
echo c - irc/py-gozerbot
mkdir -p irc/py-gozerbot > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - irc/py-gozerbot/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >irc/py-gozerbot/Makefile << 'END-of-irc/py-gozerbot/Makefile'
X# New ports collection makefile for:	py-gozerbot
X# Date created:		Wed Sep 19 00:04:39 CEST 2007
X# Whom:			Sten Spans <sten@blinkenlights.nl>
X#
X# $FreeBSD$
X#
X
XPORTNAME=	gozerbot
XPORTVERSION=	0.7.1.1
XCATEGORIES=	irc python
XMASTER_SITES=	http://gozerbot.org/media/tarball/ http://gozerbot.googlecode.com/files/
XPKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
XDISTNAME=	gozerbot-${PORTVERSION}
X
XMAINTAINER=	sten@blinkenlights.nl
XCOMMENT=	Gozerbot - A modular Python IRC and Jabber bot
X
XUSE_PYTHON=	2.4+
XUSE_PYDISTUTILS=	yes
XPYDISTUTILS_NOEGGINFO=	yes
X
XOPTIONS=	XMPP  "Jabber functions" off \
X		MYSQL "Mysql functions" off
XLATEST_LINK=	${PKGNAMESUFFIX}-${PORTNAME}
XOPTIONSFILE?=	${PORT_DBDIR}/${LATEST_LINK}/options
X
XMAN1=		gozerbot.1
XDOCS=BASIC COLLECTIVE FAQ FLEET FLOW JABBER \
X	OPER PROGRAMPLUGIN RELAY RSS \
X	THNX TOURDECODE UDP UPGRADE USER WEBSERVER
X
Xpost-install:
X.if !defined(BATCH)
X	@${SED} -e 's:%%PREFIX%%:${PREFIX}:g' <pkg-message
X.endif
X.if !defined(NOPORTDOCS)
X	@${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}
X.for i in ${DOCS}
X	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/doc/${i} ${DOCSDIR}
X.endfor
X	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/README ${DOCSDIR}
X.endif
X	@${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/man/gozerbot.1.FreeBSD ${PREFIX}/man/man1/gozerbot.1
X
X.include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
X
X.if defined(WITH_MYSQL)
XRUN_DEPENDS+=${PYTHON_SITELIBDIR}/MySQLdb/__init__.py:${PORTSDIR}/databases/py-MySQLdb
X.endif
X
X.if defined(WITH_XMPP)
XRUN_DEPENDS+=${PYTHON_SITELIBDIR}/xmpp/__init__.py:${PORTSDIR}/net-im/py-xmpppy
X.endif
X
X.include <bsd.port.post.mk>
END-of-irc/py-gozerbot/Makefile
echo x - irc/py-gozerbot/distinfo
sed 's/^X//' >irc/py-gozerbot/distinfo << 'END-of-irc/py-gozerbot/distinfo'
XMD5 (gozerbot-0.7.1.1.tar.gz) = 1c41cb08260f1c60d40d0ca9d320e189
XSHA256 (gozerbot-0.7.1.1.tar.gz) = 6b69fd511a2973974922054ba93ae349471bfc26f177df4e307e9d5eaee6a5fd
XSIZE (gozerbot-0.7.1.1.tar.gz) = 267324
END-of-irc/py-gozerbot/distinfo
echo x - irc/py-gozerbot/pkg-descr
sed 's/^X//' >irc/py-gozerbot/pkg-descr << 'END-of-irc/py-gozerbot/pkg-descr'
Xgozerbot is a modular Python IRC and Jabber bot
X
XFeatures:
X    * user management by userhost .. bot will not respond if it doesn't know you
X    * fleet .. use more than one bot in a program (list of bots)
X    * use the bot through dcc chat .. partyline
X    * fetch rss feeds.
X    * keep todo and shop lists
X    * karma
X    * quote
X    * remember items
X    * relaying between bots
X    * program your own plugins
X    * other stuff
X
XWWW: http://www.gozerbot.org/
END-of-irc/py-gozerbot/pkg-descr
echo x - irc/py-gozerbot/pkg-message
sed 's/^X//' >irc/py-gozerbot/pkg-message << 'END-of-irc/py-gozerbot/pkg-message'
X-------------------------------------------------------------
XGozerbot is installed. 
X
XInstallation directories:
X Executables -> %%PREFIX%%/bin/[gozerbot|gozerinit|gozerupgrade06]
X Documentation -> %%PREFIX%%/share/doc/gozerbot
X Config and stuff -> %%PREFIX%%/share/gozerbot
X 
X-------------------------------------------------------------
END-of-irc/py-gozerbot/pkg-message
echo x - irc/py-gozerbot/pkg-plist
sed 's/^X//' >irc/py-gozerbot/pkg-plist << 'END-of-irc/py-gozerbot/pkg-plist'
